zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerhard III. von Geldern於1185年出生在蓋爾德時，他的父親Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen35歲，母親Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern21歲。他於1207年與Margaretha van Brabant在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1229年10月22日在荷蘭利包格洛爾蒙德享年44歲，埋葬在荷蘭利包格洛爾蒙德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerhard III. von Geldern于1185年出生在蓋爾德时，他的父亲Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen35岁，母亲Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern21岁。他于1207年与Margaretha van Brabant在荷兰蓋爾德藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1229年10月22日在荷兰利包格洛爾蒙德享年44岁，埋葬在荷兰利包格洛爾蒙德。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Gerhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerhard III. von Geldern was born in 1185, in Guelders, his father, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, was 35 and his mother, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, was 21. He married Margaretha van Brabant in 1207, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 October 1229, in Roermond, Limburg, Netherlands, at the age of 44, and was buried in Roermond, Limburg, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerhard III. von Geldern est né en 1185, à Geldern, son père, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaretha van Brabant en 1207, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 octobre 1229, à Roermond, Limbourg, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Roermond, Limbourg, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerhard III. von Geldern 1185 in Geldern geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen 35 und seine Mutter Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern 21. Er hat 1207 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande Margaretha van Brabant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Oktober 1229 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Roermond, Limburg, Niederlande und wurde in Roermond, Limburg, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard III. von Geldern è nato il nel 1185 nel Geldern, il suo padre, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaretha van Brabant nel 1207, nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 ottobre 1229, nel Roermond, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Roermond, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerhard III. von Geldernが1185年にジェルデルンで生まれた時，父Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphenは35歳，母Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayernは21歳であった。1207年にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンでMargaretha van Brabantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1229年10月22日にオランダリンブルグロールモンドで44歳で死去し，オランダリンブルグロールモンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerhard III. von Geldern(이)가 1185년 글더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1207년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 Margaretha van Brabant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1229년 10월 22일 네덜란드 림버그 로몽에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 림버그 로몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard III. von Geldern nasceu em 1185, em Geldern, seu pai, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaretha van Brabant em 1207, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1229, em Roermond, Limburgo, Países Baixos, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Roermond, Limburgo, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerhard III. von Geldern родился в 1185 г. в местности джелдирн, его отцу по имени Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha van Brabant в 1207 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 октября 1229 г. в местности роирмонд, лимбург, Нидерланды в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности роирмонд, лимбург, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerhard III. von Geldern nació en 1185, en Geldern, su papá, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaretha van Brabant en 1207, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1229, en Roermond, Limburg, Países Bajos, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Roermond, Limburg, Países Bajos.
